name: PR1950_LongTrainArtifactScaling
author: Christopher-Lee-McClendon
description: Studies artifact size and BPB as a function of training duration for PR #1950 recipe. Finding: artifact size is constant (±9 KB) but BPB improves from 1.06 to 1.04 over 60 min.
research_question: Does longer training make the model more compressible or achieve lower BPB?
result: NEGATIVE for compressibility; POSITIVE for BPB
notes: The 60-min row is the final post-stop export (training capped at 3598.25s by GPTQ_RESERVE_SECONDS=5.5). train.log is rank-0 log; pgolf_stdout.txt is combined stdout.
